name: Omniyat
trackRecord:
• Founded 2005; ultra-luxury / branded-residence developer (Omniyat)
• Flagship works: One at Palm Jumeirah, The Lana (Dorchester Collection), AVA, ORLA
• DXB (since 2012): 3 projects / 394 units delivered; 9 projects / 1,393 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 236 transactions, AED 6.7B sales value (very high AED/unit); 26% capital gain
• Boutique volume, record-setting price points; among Dubai's most exclusive branded developers
blurbCn: 奥姆尼亚特（Omniyat）为迪拜顶级超豪华与品牌住宅开发商，2005年成立，代表作包括棕榈岛One、The Lana（Dorchester Collection）、AVA、ORLA等。交付量小而精，2026年迄今仅成交236套但销售额高达约67亿迪拉姆，单套均价冠绝全市，资本增值率26%。定位金字塔尖客群，稀缺性与品牌溢价极强，属超高净值资产配置标的。

name: Emaar
trackRecord:
• Founded 1997; flagship listed on DFM (EMAAR); development arm Emaar Development PJSC
• Developer of Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai
• DXB (since 2012): 182 projects / 114,497 units delivered; 141 projects / 73,520 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 5,415 transactions, AED 30B sales value, ~AED 5.6B capital gain — #1 developer by sales in Dubai
• Strong on-time delivery record and best-in-market resale liquidity
blurbCn: 迪拜最大上市开发商（DFM 代码 EMAAR），1997 年成立，哈利法塔与迪拜购物中心的缔造者。旗下社区涵盖迪拜市中心、迪拜溪港、迪拜山庄、海滨新城等标杆片区，累计交付 180+ 项目、11 万+ 套，2026 年迄今以约 300 亿迪拉姆销售额居迪拜市场第一。交付记录稳健，品牌溢价与二手流动性市场领先。

name: Meraas
trackRecord:
• Founded 2007; Dubai Holding's premium lifestyle developer (government-owned)
• Iconic destinations: City Walk, Bluewaters Island (Ain Dubai), La Mer, Port de la Mer, Jumeirah
• DXB (since 2012): 36 projects / 11,420 units delivered; 37 projects / 12,693 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 946 transactions, AED 7.6B sales value, ~AED 1.7B capital gain; 33.3% capital gain, 92% absorption
• Prime waterfront and central-Dubai locations with strong lifestyle branding
blurbCn: 美拉斯隶属迪拜控股集团，为政府背景的高端生活方式开发商，2007年成立。以City Walk、蓝水岛（迪拜眼）、La Mer海滨、Port de la Mer、朱美拉等标志性目的地闻名，项目多位于市中心与滨海黄金地段。累计交付36个项目、1.1万余套，2026年迄今销售额约76亿迪拉姆，资本增值率超33%，去化率约92%，品牌溢价与稀缺地段属性突出。

name: Sobha
trackRecord:
• Founded 1998 (Sobha Realty, part of Sobha Group); PNC Menon's flagship
• Known for in-house 'backward integration' construction and Sobha Hartland / Hartland II master communities
• DXB (since 2012): 15 projects / 12,350 units delivered; 21 projects / 34,941 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 1,675 transactions, AED 5.2B sales value; 6.5% capital gain, 90% absorption
• Reputation for premium build quality and vertically integrated delivery
blurbCn: 索巴（Sobha Realty）隶属索巴集团，1998年由PNC Menon创立，以自建自控的垂直一体化施工体系和顶级建造品质著称。代表社区为Sobha Hartland及Hartland II。当前在建21个项目、逾3.4万套，2026年迄今销售额约52亿迪拉姆，去化率约90%。产品以高品质精装与临水地段为卖点，适合注重工程质量的投资者。

name: Nakheel
trackRecord:
• Founded 2000; government-owned (Dubai Holding) master developer
• Creator of Palm Jumeirah, Palm Jebel Ali, The World, Deira Islands, Jumeirah Village
• DXB (since 2012): 27 projects / 8,900 units delivered; 13 projects / 8,437 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 653 transactions, AED 3.5B sales value, ~AED 2.8B capital gain; 32% capital gain, 89% absorption
• Iconic waterfront land bank; among the highest capital-gain records in the market
blurbCn: 纳赫勒为迪拜控股旗下政府背景大型总体开发商，2000年成立，缔造了棕榈朱美拉、棕榈杰贝阿里、世界群岛、迪拜环等标志性填海项目。累计交付27个项目、约8,900套，2026年迄今销售额约35亿迪拉姆，资本增值约28亿、增值率超32%，去化率约89%。稀缺海景地块储备丰富，长期资本增值表现居市场前列。

name: Dubai Properties
trackRecord:
• Dubai Properties (now part of Dubai Holding Real Estate); government-owned master developer
• Developer of JBR, Business Bay, Dubailand, Villanova, Mudon, Serena communities
• DXB (since 2012): 30 projects / 18,001 units delivered; 6 projects / 2,600 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 131 transactions, AED 451.6M sales value, ~AED 990.8M capital gain; 35% capital gain, 95% absorption
• Mature community land bank; high absorption and strong long-term capital appreciation
blurbCn: 迪拜地产（Dubai Properties，现并入迪拜控股房地产）为政府背景大型社区总体开发商，缔造JBR、Business Bay、Dubailand及Villanova、Mudon、Serena等成熟社区。累计交付30个项目、约1.8万套，在建规模较小。2026年迄今销售额约4.5亿迪拉姆，资本增值率35%、去化率高达95%。成熟社区储备丰富，长线资本增值与租赁稳定性突出，属稳健型政府开发商。

name: Beyond
blurbCn: 超越地产（Beyond）为迪拜私营开发商，2024年成立。据DXB市场数据，当前在建10个项目、尚无交付记录，2026年迄今销售额约67亿迪拉姆，为销售表现强劲的新晋开发商。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级4枫叶。

name: Ellington
trackRecord:
• Founded 2014; design-led boutique developer (Ellington Properties)
• Known for architectural quality, art-inspired lobbies and communities in Palm Jumeirah, MBR City, JVC
• DXB (since 2012): 20 projects / 5,499 units delivered; 30 projects / 14,270 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 2,422 transactions (#6 by volume), AED 7B sales value; 21% capital gain, 82% absorption
• Strong resale premium and end-user appeal from design-first positioning
blurbCn: 埃灵顿（Ellington Properties）为设计驱动型精品开发商，2014年成立，以建筑美学、艺术化公共空间和高品质精装著称，社区分布于棕榈朱美拉、MBR City、JVC等地。累计交付20个项目、约5,500套，在建30个项目、逾1.4万套。2026年迄今成交2,422套居全市第六，销售额约70亿迪拉姆，资本增值率21%。设计溢价与自住客群偏好突出，二手抗跌性强。

name: Binghatti
trackRecord:
• Founded 2008; family-owned private developer known for hyper-fast delivery
• Signature architecture and branded towers (Bugatti Residences, Mercedes-Benz Places)
• DXB (since 2012): 39 projects / 12,051 units delivered; 37 projects / 38,805 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 4,927 transactions (#4 by volume), AED 7.6B sales value; 23% capital gain, 76% absorption
• High-velocity launches concentrated in JVC and central districts; strong studio/1BR investor demand
blurbCn: 宾加蒂为家族私营开发商，2008年成立，以极快的交付速度与标志性外立面设计著称，并推出Bugatti Residences、Mercedes-Benz Places等品牌联名塔楼。累计交付39个项目、逾1.2万套，在建规模近3.9万套。2026年迄今成交4,927套居全市第四，销售额约76亿迪拉姆，资本增值率23%。主打Studio及1房，投资门槛低、租赁需求旺盛。

name: Iman
trackRecord:
• Iman Developers, founded 2016; private mid-market developer
• Known for the 'Oxford' branded series in JVC and Arjan
• DXB (since 2012): 5 projects / 780 units delivered; 8 projects / 3,331 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 593 transactions, AED 877.1M sales value; 20% capital gain, 87% absorption
• Value-segment apartments with strong sell-through velocity
blurbCn: Iman Developers为私营中端开发商，2016年成立，以JVC、Arjan等地的"Oxford"系列品牌产品著称。迪拜口径累计交付5个项目、约780套，在建8个项目、逾3,300套。2026年迄今销售额约8.8亿迪拉姆，资本增值率20%、去化率87%。主打平价公寓，去化速度快，适合追求高租金回报的入门投资者。

name: Damac
trackRecord:
• Founded 2002 by Hussain Sajwani; listed (returned to DFM), luxury-focused developer
• Known for branded residences (Cavalli, de GRISOGONO, Versace) and DAMAC Hills, DAMAC Lagoons
• DXB (since 2012): 106 projects / 50,550 units delivered; 105 projects / 57,989 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 6,009 transactions (#1 by volume), AED 16B sales value; 12.9% capital gain, 82% absorption
• Largest private luxury developer by transaction count in Dubai
blurbCn: 达马克由Hussain Sajwani于2002年创立，为迪拜领先的豪华地产开发商（DFM上市）。以Cavalli、Versace、de GRISOGONO等品牌联名住宅及DAMAC Hills、DAMAC Lagoons社区闻名。累计交付106个项目、逾5万套，2026年迄今成交量6,009套居全市首位，销售额约160亿迪拉姆。定位高端奢华，产品线广、付款计划灵活，为规模最大的私营豪宅开发商。

name: Tiger
trackRecord:
• Tiger Properties (Tiger Group), long-established private developer (group since 1976)
• Value-segment high-rise apartments in Al Nahda, Arjan, JVC, Liwan
• DXB (since 2012): 12 projects / 4,970 units delivered; 12 projects / 8,348 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 324 transactions, AED 371.2M sales value; 19% capital gain, 55% absorption
• Affordable studio/1BR focus; long operating history in the mid-market
blurbCn: Tiger Properties隶属Tiger集团（集团成立于1976年），为经营历史悠久的私营开发商，主打Al Nahda、Arjan、JVC、Liwan等地的平价高层公寓。迪拜口径累计交付12个项目、约4,970套，在建12个项目。2026年迄今销售额约3.7亿迪拉姆，去化率55%。以Studio及1房平价产品为主，品牌历史长，适合低总价投资入门。

name: Reportage
trackRecord:
• Reportage Properties (Abu Dhabi-based private developer, active in Dubai)
• High-volume affordable launches in Dubailand, DIP, Al Furjan; interest-free payment plans
• DXB (since 2012): 1 project / 378 units delivered; 15 projects / 8,279 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 1,381 transactions, AED 1.7B sales value; 16% capital gain, 45% absorption
• Aggressive value-segment launch strategy; early-stage delivery record in Dubai
blurbCn: Reportage Properties为阿布扎比背景私营开发商，近年在迪拜大举扩张，项目集中于Dubailand、DIP、Al Furjan等地，主打平价产品与免息付款计划。迪拜口径累计交付1个项目，在建15个项目、逾8,200套。2026年迄今销售额约17亿迪拉姆，去化率45%（偏低）。以高发盘量的平价投资产品为主，迪拜交付记录尚处早期，适合低总价入门型买家。

name: Danube
trackRecord:
• Founded 1993; part of Danube Group (building materials + real estate), private
• Known for affordable 1% monthly payment plans and fully-furnished units
• DXB (since 2012): 19 projects / 12,279 units delivered; 21 projects / 22,233 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 1,615 transactions, AED 3.5B sales value; 12% capital gain, 86% absorption
• Value-segment leader with strong absorption and investor-friendly payment terms
blurbCn: 多瑙（Danube Properties）隶属Danube集团（建材+地产），1993年成立，以"1%月供"平价付款计划及全屋精装交付著称。累计交付19个项目、逾1.2万套，在建规模逾2.2万套。2026年迄今销售额约35亿迪拉姆，去化率86%。定位平价刚需与投资入门市场，付款门槛低、去化快，适合追求现金流与低总价的买家。

name: MAG
trackRecord:
• MAG (Moafaq Al Gaddah Group); property arm of a diversified UAE conglomerate
• Projects in Meydan (MAG City), Dubai South, plus wellness-branded Keturah Reserve
• DXB (since 2012): 7 projects / 7,268 units delivered; 6 projects / 1,671 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 122 transactions, AED 315.1M sales value; 26% capital gain, 50% absorption
• Spans affordable to ultra-luxury (Keturah); moderate current absorption
blurbCn: MAG（Moafaq Al Gaddah集团）为阿联酋多元化集团旗下地产板块，项目涵盖Meydan（MAG City）、迪拜南城及养生豪宅品牌Keturah Reserve。累计交付7个项目、逾7,200套，在建6个项目。2026年迄今销售额约3.2亿迪拉姆，资本增值率26%、去化率50%。产品线从平价延伸至超豪华（Keturah），当前去化中等，品牌跨度较大。

name: Object One
trackRecord:
• Object 1 (Object One Real Estate Development), founded 2021; private developer with European (DDA Group) roots
• Contemporary mid-market apartments in JVC, JVT, Al Furjan
• DXB (since 2012): 1 project / 146 units delivered; 22 projects / 5,315 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 450 transactions, AED 528.3M sales value; 66% absorption
• Young, fast-launching brand; delivery record still early-stage
blurbCn: Object 1（Object One）为2021年成立的私营开发商，具欧洲（DDA集团）背景，主打JVC、JVT、Al Furjan等地的现代中端公寓。迪拜口径累计交付1个项目，在建22个项目、逾5,300套，发盘迅速。2026年迄今销售额约5.3亿迪拉姆，去化率66%。品牌年轻、扩张快，但交付记录尚处早期，适合看重新兴片区平价产品的买家。

name: LEOS
blurbCn: 里奥斯（LEOS）为迪拜私营开发商，2012年成立。据DXB市场数据，累计交付1个项目、当前在建8个项目，2026年迄今销售额约6.9亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Al Habtoor
blurbCn: 阿尔哈布图尔（Al Habtoor）为迪拜家族背景开发商，成立于1970年，经营历史悠久。据DXB市场数据，累计交付1个项目、当前在建4个项目，2026年迄今销售额约8.0亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Azizi
trackRecord:
• Founded 1989; large private developer (Azizi Developments)
• Concentrated in Al Furjan, MBR City, Dubai Healthcare City; mega-project Azizi Riviera and Burj Azizi
• DXB (since 2012): 89 projects / 23,250 units delivered; 44 projects / 52,185 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 6,470 transactions (highest volume on list), AED 5.8B sales value; 9.8% capital gain, 36% absorption
• Very high launch volume of studios/1BR; large under-construction pipeline
blurbCn: 阿齐兹（Azizi Developments）为大型私营开发商，1989年成立，项目集中于Al Furjan、MBR City、迪拜医疗城等地，旗舰大盘Azizi Riviera及超高层Burj Azizi。累计交付89个项目、逾2.3万套，在建规模高达5.2万套。2026年迄今成交6,470套为全榜之最，销售额约58亿迪拉姆。主打Studio及1房、供应量大，去化率相对偏低（36%），适合看重低总价与租赁市场的投资者。

name: Samana
trackRecord:
• Founded 2016; fast-growing private developer (Samana Developers)
• Known for private-pool apartments and resort-style amenities in JVC, Dubailand, Arjan
• DXB (since 2012): 6 projects / 1,350 units delivered; 42 projects / 15,197 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 1,664 transactions, AED 1.9B sales value; 90% absorption (strong sell-through)
• High-volume value segment; heavy studio/1BR launch pipeline
blurbCn: 萨马纳（Samana Developers）为快速崛起的私营开发商，2016年成立，以"户户私人泳池"及度假式配套著称，项目集中于JVC、Dubailand、Arjan等地。当前在建42个项目、逾1.5万套，交付6个项目。2026年迄今销售额约19亿迪拉姆，去化率高达90%。主打Studio及1房平价投资产品，去化速度快，适合追求高租金回报的入门投资者。

name: Wasl
trackRecord:
• wasl (Dubai Real Estate Corp), government-owned; asset-management and development arm of the Dubai government
• Major landlord and developer of wasl1, wasl Gate, Za'abeel and city-centre communities
• DXB (since 2012): 3 projects / 3,073 units delivered; 11 projects / 6,137 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 620 transactions, AED 3.3B sales value; 13% capital gain, 63% absorption
• Prime central-Dubai land holdings; long-term hold and rental-income orientation
blurbCn: 瓦斯尔（wasl，隶属迪拜房地产总公司）为迪拜政府资产管理与开发平台，是市中心大型业主与开发商，代表项目包括wasl1、wasl Gate、Za'abeel等。当前在建11个项目、逾6,000套，2026年迄今销售额约33亿迪拉姆，资本增值率13%。地段多位于城市核心黄金地带，长期持有与租金收益属性突出，背靠政府信用稳健。

name: Imtiaz
trackRecord:
• Private developer (Imtiaz Developments); design-focused mid-market brand
• Active in JVC, Dubai Islands, Meydan with fully-furnished branded projects
• DXB (since 2012): 9 projects / 1,447 units delivered; 31 projects / 7,181 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 1,454 transactions, AED 2.6B sales value; 24% capital gain, 80% absorption
• Rapidly scaling launch pipeline with strong studio/1BR investor demand
blurbCn: Imtiaz Developments为设计导向的私营中端开发商，项目集中于JVC、迪拜群岛、Meydan等地，多为全屋精装品牌产品。累计交付9个项目，在建31个项目、逾7,000套，扩张迅速。2026年迄今销售额约26亿迪拉姆，资本增值率24%、去化率80%。主打Studio及1房投资产品，性价比与精装标准较高，投资门槛适中。

name: Dar Global
blurbCn: DarGlobal（Dar Global PLC）成立于2017年，是沙特最大上市地产商Dar Al Arkan集团的国际豪宅开发平台，2023年在伦敦证券交易所（LSE）上市。主打全球顶级品牌联名豪宅，代表项目包括迪拜Trump International Hotel & Tower（与特朗普集团合作）、Business Bay的Urban Oasis by Missoni，并与Aston Martin、Lamborghini等品牌合作打造限量豪宅。定位超高净值品牌溢价市场，产品稀缺性强，适合追求国际品牌背书的投资者。

name: OCTA
blurbCn: 奥克塔（OCTA）为迪拜私营开发商，2021年成立。据DXB市场数据，当前在建2个项目、尚无交付记录，2026年迄今销售额约1.5亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Nshama
trackRecord:
• Founded 2014; private developer of the Town Square Dubai master community
• Focus on affordable townhouses and apartments for end-users
• DXB (since 2012): 22 projects / 13,836 units delivered; 25 projects / 5,157 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 494 transactions, AED 762.8M sales value, ~AED 266M capital gain; 32% capital gain, 86% absorption
• Value-oriented community developer with strong end-user demand
blurbCn: Nshama为私营社区开发商，2014年成立，核心项目为Town Square Dubai大型社区，主打平价联排别墅与公寓，面向自住客群。累计交付22个项目、逾1.3万套，在建25个项目。2026年迄今销售额约7.6亿迪拉姆，资本增值率32%、去化率86%。定位刚需社区市场，配套完善、性价比高，适合自住与稳健长线持有。

name: Palma
blurbCn: 帕尔玛（Palma）为迪拜私营开发商，1998年成立。据DXB市场数据，当前在建2个项目，2026年迄今销售额约3.3亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: DEYAAR
trackRecord:
• Founded 2002; listed on DFM (DEYAAR), backed by Dubai Islamic Bank
• Projects in Business Bay, Al Barsha, DIP; brands include Midtown and Regalia
• DXB (since 2012): 16 projects / 8,663 units delivered; 10 projects / 4,461 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 691 transactions, AED 1.2B sales value; 17% capital gain, 92% absorption
• Established listed developer with steady mid-market delivery track record
blurbCn: Deyaar为迪拜上市开发商（DFM代码DEYAAR），2002年成立，背靠迪拜伊斯兰银行。项目分布于Business Bay、Al Barsha、DIP等地，旗下品牌包括Midtown、Regalia等。累计交付16个项目、逾8,600套，在建10个项目。2026年迄今销售额约12亿迪拉姆，资本增值率17%、去化率92%。为交付记录稳健的成熟上市中端开发商。

name: Majid Al Futtaim
trackRecord:
• Majid Al Futtaim (private conglomerate); Mall of the Emirates / Carrefour operator, real-estate arm develops Tilal Al Ghaf
• Flagship community Tilal Al Ghaf; also City Centre-anchored mixed-use developments
• DXB (since 2012): 3 projects / 2,993 units delivered; 10 projects / 4,030 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 275 transactions, AED 788M sales value, ~AED 440.8M capital gain; 52% capital gain (highest on list), 97% absorption
• Best-in-class capital appreciation and absorption from premium master-community positioning
blurbCn: 马吉德·阿尔·福塔伊姆（Majid Al Futtaim）为私营综合集团，旗下运营阿联酋购物中心与家乐福，其地产板块开发旗舰社区Tilal Al Ghaf及City Centre综合体。累计交付3个项目、近3,000套，在建10个项目。2026年迄今销售额约7.9亿迪拉姆，资本增值率高达52%（全榜最高）、去化率97%。凭借高端总体社区定位，资本增值与去化表现冠绝全榜。

name: Select Group
trackRecord:
• Select Group, founded 2002; private developer focused on Dubai Marina and Business Bay
• Known for waterfront towers: Marina Gate, Peninsula, Six Senses Residences The Palm
• DXB (since 2012): 12 projects / 7,690 units delivered; 7 projects / 3,607 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 192 transactions, AED 765.2M sales value; 19% capital gain, 90% absorption
• Premium waterfront positioning with strong delivery track record
blurbCn: Select Group为私营开发商，2002年成立，专注于迪拜码头与Business Bay的临水高层项目，代表作包括Marina Gate、Peninsula及棕榈岛Six Senses Residences。累计交付12个项目、逾7,600套，在建7个项目。2026年迄今销售额约7.7亿迪拉姆，资本增值率19%、去化率90%。定位高端滨水市场，交付记录扎实，产品稀缺性与二手流动性较好。

name: Prescott
trackRecord:
• Prescott Developers, private mid-market developer active in JVC, Arjan, Dubai Studio City
• DXB (since 2012): 6 projects / 848 units delivered; 6 projects / 1,466 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 70 transactions, AED 156.9M sales value; 24% capital gain, 85% absorption
• Small-scale value developer with steady absorption
blurbCn: Prescott Developers为私营中端开发商，项目分布于JVC、Arjan、Dubai Studio City等地。迪拜口径累计交付6个项目、约848套，在建6个项目、约1,466套。2026年迄今销售额约1.6亿迪拉姆，资本增值率24%、去化率85%。为规模较小的平价开发商，去化稳定，主打1房投资产品。

name: Dubai South
trackRecord:
• Dubai South (government master developer around Al Maktoum Intl Airport / Expo City)
• Master-plans the Residential District, Golf District and aviation/logistics zones
• DXB (since 2012): 13 projects / 4,665 units delivered; 14 projects / 4,291 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 458 transactions, AED 1.3B sales value; 43% capital gain (highest-growth zone), 92% absorption
• Strategic growth corridor tied to DWC airport expansion; strong appreciation upside
blurbCn: 迪拜南城（Dubai South）为政府总体开发商，围绕阿勒马克图姆国际机场（DWC）与世博城规划住宅区、高尔夫区及航空物流园区。累计交付13个项目、约4,665套，在建14个项目。2026年迄今销售额约13亿迪拉姆，资本增值率高达43%（全市增长最快片区之一）、去化率92%。受益于新机场扩建的战略增长走廊，长线升值潜力显著。

name: Taraf Holding
trackRecord:
- Founded 2022 as the real estate arm of Yas Holding (UAE investment conglomerate); privately held
- Notable projects: Luce (Palm Jumeirah), Terrazzo Residences (JVC), Karl Lagerfeld Villas (Meydan/MBR City), Terra Golf Collection (Jumeirah Golf Estates), Solea (Saadiyat Island, Abu Dhabi)
- Backed by Yas Holding's balance sheet, providing strong completion assurance versus smaller independent developers
- Positioning: ultra-luxury, design-led branded residences targeting high-net-worth buyers
blurbCn: Taraf Holding是阿联酋大型综合投资集团Yas Holding旗下的房地产开发板块，成立于2022年，专注棕榈岛、迪拜山庄高尔夫庄园（Jumeirah Golf Estates）及JVC等区域的高端住宅项目。旗舰项目包括棕榈岛豪华公寓Luce、JVC的Terrazzo Residences，以及与卡尔拉格斐（Karl Lagerfeld）联名打造的迈丹别墅项目。背靠Yas Holding雄厚资本实力，为投资者提供较强的项目交付保障，定位服务高净值及超高净值买家。

name: H&H
blurbCn: H&H地产（H&H Development）为迪拜私营开发商，2007年成立。据DXB市场数据，累计交付1个项目、当前在建6个项目，2026年迄今销售额约75亿迪拉姆，销售表现居中端开发商前列。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Kasco
blurbCn: 卡斯科（Kasco）为迪拜私营开发商。据DXB市场数据，累计交付1个项目、当前在建2个项目，2026年迄今销售额约7,600万迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: City View
blurbCn: 城景地产（City View）为迪拜私营开发商。据DXB市场数据，当前在建2个项目、尚无交付记录，2026年迄今销售额约1.5亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3枫叶。

name: Meydan
trackRecord:
• Meydan Group; government-linked master developer chaired by Sheikh Mohammed's Meydan
• Master developer of Meydan City, District One (Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum City), Meydan One
• DXB (since 2012): 42 projects / 5,604 units delivered; 4 projects / 2,731 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: sales value/capital gain not separately reported on leaderboard; 100% absorption on current pipeline
• Prime central land bank; frequently partners with third-party developers (e.g. Sobha, Nakheel) on sub-plots
blurbCn: Meydan集团为政府关联的大型总体开发商，由谢赫穆罕默德旗下Meydan主导，是Meydan City、District One（穆罕默德·本·拉希德城）、Meydan One等大盘的土地方与总体开发商。累计交付42个项目、逾5,600套，当前在建管线去化率100%。地段位于城市核心黄金地带，常与索巴、纳赫勒等第三方开发商就子地块合作开发。DXB榜单未单列其销售额，属稀缺地段总体开发商。

name: Prestige One
trackRecord:
• Prestige One Developments, founded 2023; young private developer
• Projects in JVC, Dubai Sports City, Dubai Islands
• DXB (since 2012): 2 projects / 238 units delivered; 12 projects / 1,945 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 186 transactions, AED 400.6M sales value; 6% capital gain, 76% absorption
• Early-stage brand with rapid launch pipeline
blurbCn: Prestige One Developments为2023年成立的年轻私营开发商，项目分布于JVC、Dubai Sports City、迪拜群岛等地。迪拜口径累计交付2个项目、约238套，在建12个项目、约1,945套。2026年迄今销售额约4亿迪拉姆，去化率76%。品牌成立时间短、发盘节奏快，交付记录仍处早期，适合关注新兴平价片区的投资者。

name: The First Group
trackRecord:
• The First Group, founded 1995; hospitality-focused private developer
• Specialises in branded hotel apartments (TRYP by Wyndham, Ciel Dubai Marina)
• DXB (since 2012): 10 projects / 7,320 units delivered; 2 projects / 981 units under construction
• 2026 YTD: 177 transactions, AED 116.3M sales value; 87% absorption
• Hotel-apartment / serviced-residence niche, predominantly studios
blurbCn: The First Group为专注酒店业态的私营开发商，1995年成立，主打品牌酒店式公寓（如TRYP by Wyndham、Ciel Dubai Marina）。迪拜口径累计交付10个项目、逾7,300套，在建2个项目。2026年迄今销售额约1.2亿迪拉姆，去化率87%，成交近九成为Studio。定位酒店式公寓与服务式住宅细分市场，主打租金托管与短租收益产品。

name: Diamond
trackRecord:
• Diamond Developers, founded 2003; private developer behind The Sustainable City
• Pioneer of sustainability-led master communities (net-zero focus)
• DXB (since 2012): 11 projects / 1,321 units delivered; no active under-construction pipeline tracked
• 2026 YTD: 17 transactions, AED 16.6M sales value; 37% capital gain
• Niche sustainability brand; low transaction volume, strong appreciation on delivered stock
blurbCn: Diamond Developers为私营开发商，2003年成立，是迪拜可持续之城（The Sustainable City）的缔造者，专注可持续/净零碳总体社区开发。累计交付11个项目、约1,321套，当前无在建管线跟踪。2026年迄今仅成交17套、销售额约1,660万迪拉姆，但已交付房产资本增值率达37%。属可持续细分市场的小众品牌，成交量低但成熟社区增值稳健。

name: Jag Development
trackRecord:
- Founded 1999; privately held; registered with Dubai Land Department as Developer No. 1233 (March 2018)
- Notable projects: The Nook (Wasl Gate), South Garden A-E, Boulevard Park 1 & 2, Hillside Residences (all Jebel Ali / Wasl Gate community)
- Delivery track record: 3 delivered projects / 1,394 units; 7 projects / 1,959 units under construction (per DXB Interact data)
- Positioning: mid-market to end-user focused apartments, predominantly 1-2 bedroom mix (79% of YTD sales volume)
blurbCn: JAG Development是迪拜本地私营地产开发商，1999年成立，2018年3月在迪拜土地局（DLD）正式注册为开发商（编号1233）。公司主要深耕Jebel Ali区域的Wasl Gate社区，代表项目包括The Nook、South Garden系列及Boulevard Park系列公寓。据DXB市场数据，该开发商在建项目7个、在建单位约1,959套，已交付项目3个、单位1,394套，2026年至今销售额约4.46亿迪拉姆。产品定位以刚需及中端公寓为主，1-2居室占主力户型。

name: Peace Homes
trackRecord:
- Founded 2012/2013 by Ahsaan Rasheed; privately held; headquartered in JVC, Dubai
- Umbrella brand with multiple related entities (Peace Homes Development, Horizon, Elite, International, Global, Signatures)
- Notable projects: Peace Lagoons & Phase 2 (DLRC), Sky Living, Sky Vista, Empire Suites/Residence, Peace Avenue (Jebel Ali), Natuzzi Harmony Residences (Dubai Islands, in partnership with Italian furniture brand Natuzzi)
- Positioning: mid-market, accessible-luxury apartments focused on JVC and DLRC; reported ~AED 3.3B cumulative sales across 12+ launched projects by 2024
blurbCn: Peace Homes（又称Peace Homes Group / Developments）是迪拜本土私营地产开发商，由创始人Ahsaan Rasheed于2012/2013年创立，总部位于JVC，主攻JVC与Dubai Land Residence Complex（DLRC）两大高活跃度社区的中端刚需公寓。旗下品牌矩阵较大，包含Peace Homes Development、Horizon、Elite、International、Global、Signatures等多家关联公司，代表项目有Peace Lagoons、Sky Living、Sky Vista、Empire Suites及迪拜岛的Natuzzi Harmony Residences（意大利家具品牌联名公寓）。截至2024年该集团已推出超12个项目，累计销售额约33亿迪拉姆。

name: AG Properties
trackRecord:
- Trading name Arabian Gulf Properties; headquartered in Business Bay, Dubai
- Focus on mid-market residential apartments (mainly studio and 1-bed) in Dubailand Residence Complex and Dubai Islands
- Notable projects: AG Square, AG Central, AG Ark Tower, AUM Residence, Whitecliffs Residences
- Per DXB Interact (2026 YTD): 122 transactions, AED 88.9M sales value, 7 under-construction projects totaling 1,487 units
blurbCn: AG Properties（全称Arabian Gulf Properties）是迪拜本土房地产开发商，总部位于商业湾（Business Bay）。公司专注迪拜地产综合体（Dubailand Residence Complex）及迪拜群岛（Dubai Islands）等区域的中高端住宅开发，产品以Studio及一居公寓为主，配备智能家居系统。代表项目包括AG Square、AG Central、AUM Residence及Whitecliffs Residences。截至2026年，公司在建项目7个、在建单位约1487套，年内成交122笔，成交总额约8890万迪拉姆。

name: Avenew
trackRecord:
- Founded in Dubai, led by Rasha Hassan; registered with Dubai Land Department as Developer No. 1511
- Focus on waterfront and community residential projects in Dubai Islands and Dubai South
- Notable projects: Silena Residences, Rena, Shoaq Residences, Cheval Residences, Avenew 888
- Recently entered branded residences segment with St. Regis Residences at Dubai Islands
blurbCn: Avenew（全称AVENEW REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT L.L.C）是迪拜新兴房地产开发商，由Rasha Hassan创立，已在迪拜土地局（DLD）注册为开发商（编号1511）。公司主打迪拜群岛（Dubai Islands）及迪拜南部（Dubai South）区域的高端住宅与滨海社区项目，代表项目包括Silena Residences、Rena、Shoaq Residences及Avenew 888。公司近期首次进军品牌公寓领域，与万豪旗下瑞吉（St. Regis）在迪拜群岛合作打造品牌住宅项目。

name: Expo City
trackRecord:
- Government-backed master developer on former Expo 2020 site; 6 UC projects/2,539 units tracked since 2012, 0 delivered, 87.71% absorption
- 2026 YTD: 51 transactions, AED 155.7M sales value, 13.78% capital gain
- 8 DLD SPVs found by name match (Al Waha/Valley/Sidr/Mangrove/Sky Residences etc.) but none clearly = single 'Primary Dev#' — flagged, all linked for reference
blurbCn: Expo City Dubai：政府主导的原世博园区总体开发商，在建6项目2539单位，2026年至今成交51宗、销售额1.557亿迪拉姆，资本增值13.78%。

name: Pantheon
trackRecord:
- Founded 2016 in Dubai by Kalpesh Kinariwala; privately held boutique developer headquartered in Business Bay
- Specializes in mid-to-upper residential communities in JVC, JVT, and Ras Al Khaimah; notable projects include Pantheon Elysee I/II/III, Maison Elysee series, Elysee Heights, and Boulevard
- Known locally as "The Delivery Man of JVC" (2024 recognition) reflecting a track record of completed handovers in the JVC district
- Currently expanding with under-construction projects VOXA (JVT), One RAK Central and Omya Residences (Al Wasl Gate/RAK), positioning itself in the boutique/niche luxury-affordable segment
blurbCn: Pantheon Development（万神殿地产）成立于2016年，由创始人Kalpesh Kinariwala领导，总部位于迪拜Business Bay。公司专注于迪拜Jumeirah Village Circle（JVC）、Jumeirah Village Triangle（JVT）及阿联酋哈伊马角（Ras Al Khaimah）等区域的中高端住宅开发，代表项目包括Pantheon Elysee系列（I/II/III）、Maison Elysee系列、Elysee Heights、Boulevard及在建的VOXA、One RAK Central、Omya Residences等。品牌定位为「精品级」本地开发商，以JVC区域高交付效率著称，曾获多项行业奖项，包括2025年最佳交付付款计划开发商等荣誉。

name: Mr Eight
trackRecord:
- Founded 2021 by Latvian entrepreneur/designer Emils Daujats; boutique, privately-owned Dubai developer with 20+ years combined European luxury real estate experience
- Full-cycle developer (land acquisition, design, marketing, construction, delivery in-house); notable projects include Villa del Gavi, Villa del Arte, Villa Del Garda, Villa Del Divos (Dubai Islands) and Interstellar Tower (JVT)
- Winner, Luxury Lifestyle Award 2025 (Best Luxury Branded Residences) and Dubai Property Awards (Best Residential Property, Grand Entrance Design)
- As of 2026 YTD: 94 sales transactions, ~AED 438.2M sales value, 4 under-construction projects (391 units), no delivered projects yet — early-stage boutique developer positioning on design-led luxury
blurbCn: Mr Eight Development是迪拜精品房地产开发商，2021年由拉脱维亚企业家兼设计师Emils Daujats创立，团队拥有20余年欧洲高端地产经验。公司采用全周期开发模式，从拿地、方案设计、营销到施工交付均自主把控。代表项目包括迪拜岛（Dubai Islands）的Villa del Gavi、Villa del Arte、Villa Del Garda、Villa Del Divos，以及JVT的Interstellar Tower等精品住宅，曾获2025年Luxury Lifestyle Award及迪拜地产大奖。截至2026年内已录得94笔销售交易，在建项目4个、391套单位，销售总额约AED 4.38亿，定位于高端精品豪宅市场。

name: Amis
trackRecord:
- Founded 2016 as AMIS Real Estate Development LLC; boutique/privately-owned Dubai developer headquartered in Al Safa, Sheikh Zayed Road
- Founder & CEO Neeraj Kumar Mishra, 15+ years in Dubai real estate
- Notable projects: Woodland Residences, Woodland Terraces, Woodland Crest and Derby Heights (all District 11, Meydan); The Tides (Dubai Islands, delivery ~Q2 2028); Fleurs de Jardin — 25 luxury villas/mansions co-designed with Jacob & Co
- Positioning: design-led boutique luxury developer emphasizing award-winning architects, sustainability features (solar, water-saving systems) and branded/limited-collection residences; reportedly secured MOU for up to AED 5bn investment from First APAC Fund VCC (Q4 2024)
blurbCn: Amis Development（原名AMIS Real Estate Development）成立于2016年，是总部位于迪拜Al Safa谢赫扎耶德路的精品豪宅开发商，由创始人Neeraj Kumar Mishra领导，深耕迪拜地产市场逾十五年。品牌定位聚焦Meydan（迈丹）第11区及迪拜群岛（Dubai Islands）的高端住宅项目，代表作包括Woodland系列（Residences/Terraces/Crest）、Derby Heights，以及与著名珠宝腕表品牌Jacob & Co联名设计的别墅项目Fleurs de Jardin，强调建筑设计感与可持续理念。适合关注小众精品开发商、追求设计稀缺性的高净值投资者。

name: HRE
trackRecord:
- Founded 2003 in Sharjah as a construction company; evolved into a vertically integrated real estate developer with in-house construction arm (20+ years experience)
- Notable projects: Skyhills Residences (Dubai Science Park, 1,142 units, JV with OCTA Properties), Celeste (Al Jaddaf)
- 2026 YTD: 383 transactions, AED 688M total sales value, ~7,302 units under construction (per DXB Interact)
- Positioning: mid-market to upper-mid apartment developer focused on Dubai Science Park and JVC-area communities
blurbCn: HRE Real Estate Development（HRE地产开发）总部位于迪拜，前身为2003年成立于沙迦的建筑公司，拥有20余年建筑及地产开发经验，采用自有施工团队的垂直整合模式，确保质量与工期可控。旗下代表项目为迪拜科学园Skyhills Residences，提供录厅至三居户型，并在Al Jaddaf开发Celeste公寓项目。根据DXB Interact数据，2026年初至今该开发商已录得383宗交易，总成交额约6.88亿迪拉姆，在建单位逾7,300套，显示其在中端公寓市场具备稳定去化能力。

name: GFS
trackRecord:
- Brand: GFS Developments (legal entity GFS Wonders Developers L.L.C / GFS Real Estate L.L.C); Chairman & Founder Irfan Wahid; HQ in Al Barsha, Dubai
- Notable projects: Coventry Gardens, Coventry Gardens II, Coventry 66 (Dubailand Residence Complex, Dubai South, Dubai Industrial City)
- Focus: affordable-to-mid-market studio/1BR/2BR apartment communities with flexible payment plans
- Positioning: fast-growing private developer expanding regional footprint; no verifiable DXB transaction data available for this profile
blurbCn: GFS Wonders Developers L.L.C（品牌名GFS Developments/GFS地产）总部位于迪拜Al Barsha，由董事长Irfan Wahid创立，据官网介绍其团队在地产及建筑领域拥有20余年经验。公司主打迪拜Dubailand Residence Complex、Dubai South及JVC等区域的中端公寓项目，代表项目为Coventry Gardens、Coventry Gardens II及Coventry 66，主力户型为录厅及一居公寓，注重高性价比与灵活付款方案。目前公司业务持续扩张，并在筹备进入英国及美国市场。

name: BT Properties
trackRecord:
- Established Jan 2025 in Dubai South as the international arm of Pakistan's Bahria Town group (founded by Malik Riaz Hussain, 30+ years in master-planned communities)
- Flagship project: Waada (Bahria Town Dubai) — 20M+ sq ft gated community in Dubai South's Golf District, mixing apartments, townhouses and villas
- Notable sub-projects: Cascada, Altura, Rayhan, District
- 2026 YTD: 346 transactions, AED 400.1M total sales value, ~2,907 units under construction across 6 projects (per DXB Interact); no delivered projects yet — newcomer developer
- Positioning: large-scale master-community developer targeting Dubai South, backed by an established South Asian parent brand
blurbCn: BT Properties DWC LLC是巴基斯坦知名地产集团Bahria Town（由Malik Riaz Hussain创立，深耕南亚地产逾30年）在迪拜设立的国际发展平台，于2025年1月正式启动，总部位于迪拜南部Dubai South商务园区。旗舰项目Waada（原Bahria Town Dubai）位于迪拜南部Golf District，占地逾2000万平方英尺，涵盖公寓、联排别墅及独栋别墅，配套教育、医疗、零售及娱乐设施。代表子项目包括Cascada、Altura、Rayhan等。根据DXB Interact数据，2026年初至今该开发商已录得346宗交易，总成交额约4亿迪拉姆，在建单位近2,907套。

name: Continental Investments
blurbCn: 康迪纳投资（Continental Investments）为迪拜开发商，2011年成立。据DXB市场数据，累计交付5个项目、当前在建5个项目，2026年迄今销售额约2.6亿迪拉姆，交付与在建规模均衡。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Fakhruddin
blurbCn: 法赫鲁丁（Fakhruddin Properties）为迪拜私营开发商，2003年成立。据DXB市场数据，当前在建4个项目，2026年迄今销售额约1.5亿迪拉姆。丹枫置业 DFP-5 评级3.5枫叶。

name: Al Helal Al Zahaby
